name: ASUS ROG MAXIMUS XII APEX ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1200 - Intel Z490 Chipset - Supports DDR4-4800(OC) - 2x PCIe 3.0 x16 - 3x M.2 Socket3 - USB 3.2 Gen2 Type-C+A - Optical S/PDIF out - Intel 2.5Gb LAN - Intel Wi-Fi 6 802.11ax - BT 5.1
shortName: ASUS ROG MAXIMUS XII APEX ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1200 - Intel
description: High-end ATX motherboard for Intel 10th gen processors with Z490 chipset, PCIe 4.0 support, and Wi-Fi 6 connectivity.
